subcodes.first_line: The Well-Beloved loveth thee and saith: Say: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Shed Thou the blood of them that invoke Thee, and our blood [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد یحبک المحبوب و یقول قل سبحانک اللهم یا الهی فاسفک دم من یدعوک و دمائنا فی
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @call to action, @praise and encouragement
